moments.author: Adam Schefter
moments.quote: Miami Dolphins and LB Jordyn Brooks have agreed to a 3‑yr $51.3 million extension with $35 m guaranteed.
moments.why: Major NFL contract extension confirmation from one of the most-followed insiders — huge buzz among sports fans, especially men 25‑45.

moments.author: Sam Presti
moments.quote: The Dort trade was a financial decision… the money saved this summer will be reallocated to future roster moves.
moments.why: Behind-the-scenes team-building insight; fans debating whether OKC sacrificed a popular defender for cap flexibility.
moments.url: Italian Sky Sport coverage citing Presti’s rare post-trade interview

moments.author: Shams Charania
moments.quote: BREAKING: The Oklahoma City Thunder trading All‑Defensive wing Lu Dort to the Atlanta Hawks in a three‑team deal…
moments.why: Massive NBA trade news, sparking intense fan debate about the value of defense vs. youth — dominating sports chatter.

moments.author: Luguentz Dort
moments.quote: I noticed it on Twitter [now X]… I had seen a bunch of pictures, memes and all that, and I was like ‘That’s a nice name.’
moments.why: Dort referencing the origin of his ‘Dorture Chamber’ nickname; a lighthearted, fan‑connected moment that’s trending with cultural flair.
